verdict.outlook: indexes range-bound, volatility normal, defensive sectors leading → mixed. No clear edge; wait for alignment before pressing.

market.label: tape-neutral
market.note: Tape neutral — indexes range-bound. Leaders: XLV, XLE, XLF.

vol.note: Market vol calm (VIXY 21.3, 4th pct) — stops can tighten.

cycle.note: Institutional flow day (Tue/Thu rebalance & hedging) — entries tend to fill on real volume.

ladder.scale_out: Take 50% @ T1 → stop to breakeven → run 50% to T2

entry_pullback.label: Bounce
entry_pullback.note: Limit: short a rally back into value/resistance; a rejection bar confirms.

ladder.scale_out: Take 50% @ T1 → stop to breakeven → run 50% to T2

duration.valid_until: expected ~2 days, valid up to ~5 days

time_stop.note: If neither stop nor target fills within ~5 days, the thesis has expired — exit at market.

entries.label: Now · market
entries.plain: Take it now at market — fastest fill, but the worst price of the three.

entries.label: Pullback · better price
entries.plain: Wait for a bounce back into value for a better price and tighter risk — may never fill.

decision.reason: Short S/R Bounce with a moderate bearish tape (33.3); higher-TF bearish. Trigger and evidence agree.

missing.detail: rejection / reclaim candle in your direction

candlestick_patterns.description: Doji — indecision, potential reversal
Inside Bar — compression; breakout direction = next move

Morning Star — 3-bar bullish reversal after downtrend
Bullish Harami — small bullish bar inside prior bearish body
Shooting Star — long upper shadow, bearish reversal signal
